texts.label: footnote
texts.orig: *Please  note  that  pick  up  times  indicated  serve  as  a  guideline  and  may  vary slightly depending on weather/ road conditions. Please reconfirm minimum pax requirements when making your bookings.
texts.text: *Please  note  that  pick  up  times  indicated  serve  as  a  guideline  and  may  vary slightly depending on weather/ road conditions. Please reconfirm minimum pax requirements when making your bookings.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: * Drop off time between 9.30 to 10.30 to same point of picking.
texts.text: Drop off time between 9.30 to 10.30 to same point of picking.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: * Picking less than minimum number of pax Extra charge 50$ to 100$ according to distance.
texts.text: Picking less than minimum number of pax Extra charge 50$ to 100$ according to distance.
